---
title: "Metric Translation across Europe’s Top 5 Football Leagues"
author: "Jeffrey Chen, Christian Emmanuel, Alex Lewis"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Abstract

# Introduction

*All code is available here: https://github.com/adlewisCMU/transfer-prediction-project/tree/main*

# Data

# Methods (Jeffrey)

# Methods (Christian)

# Methods (Alex)

# Results (Jeffrey)

# Results (Christian)

# Results (Alex)

# Discussion

# Appendix
